title: scleria cochinchinensis
intro: Scleria cochinchinensis, also known as the swamp sedge or water sedge, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scleria cochinchinensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Scleria cochinchinensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
